extra.reason: Documented and checked the incubated DeviseHx release lane: package/generator bridge contract, CI/runtime gates, security escapes, changelog note, and standalone split criteria. Verified release contracts plus DeviseHx/package/adoption smoke gates.

Reusable DeviseHx companion layer is decomposed and implemented through the completed child beads: design review/docs, core typed package, deterministic extractor/adoption generator, routes, controller/current-user typing, model/schema validation, HHX helpers, sanitizer/mailer/test seams, dogfood app, and the incubated package/release lane.

All gradual-adoption child work is complete: schema adoption, migration-history reports, generator-assisted gem-layer adoption, and reusable DeviseHx companion layer/release lane. Existing docs and smoke/runtime gates cover mixed Ruby/ERB/Haxe interop, generated contracts, fail-closed behavior, and migration paths.
Closed

Implemented same-class static scalar HHX view-local helpers, compile diagnostics for Dynamic/unsafe helper bodies, component and todoapp dogfood coverage, and cleaned Ruby block self aliases to emit idiomatic self instead of gthis. Verification: npm run format:haxe; npm run format:haxe:check; npm run test:components; npm run test:action-controller-params; npm run test:action-mailer; npm run test:todoapp-rails; npm run test:snapshots; npm test.
Closed
R&D report added at docs/ruby-stdlib-rd.md and follow-up beads haxe.ruby-bjv.12.2 through haxe.ruby-bjv.12.7 created.
Std.unit.hx parity is enabled in the Ruby unitstd lane with semantic stringify/isOfType support and passing local gates.

Implemented Ruby Reflect std facade and runtime helpers. Verified: npm run test:runtime-minitest; npm run test:stdlib-mvp; npm run test:unitstd-ruby; npm run test:examples-compile; npm run test:stdlib-inventory; npm run test:gap-report; npm run test:snapshots; npm run public:precommit.
Closed

Implemented safe direct Ruby lowerings for Array.concat/contains/copy, documented Array/Lambda/Map helper audit decisions, refreshed generated route parity and stdlib snapshots, and verified with full npm test.

Added Ruby stdlib facade authoring guide covering package naming, API shape, direct Ruby lowering, HXRuby helper policy, examples, and test expectations; linked it from docs and std README; verified inventory/gap/precommit gates.

Implemented haxe.Json under std/_std using Ruby JSON.parse/generate/pretty_generate with require metadata, added native Ruby JSON facade methods, updated stdlib MVP coverage for parse/stringify/pretty output plus parser and replacer failure probes, refreshed inventory/gap report and stdlib snapshots, and verified focused gates plus public precommit.

Implemented sys.FileSystem and sys.io.File as erased Ruby std facades backed by direct Ruby File, Dir, and FileUtils calls; added Bytes.getString compatibility, compiler suppression for lowercase sys.* runtime shells, stdlib MVP runtime coverage, direct-output smoke assertions, and refreshed inventory/gap report to zero missing stdlib entries.

Established the Ruby upstream unitstd runtime parity lane with checked-in provenance-tracked fixtures, deterministic sync script, npm run test:unitstd-ruby, docs for snapshot-vs-runtime responsibilities, production-readiness evidence, and passing focused gates. Baseline fixtures cover IntIterator, Math, String, StringBuf, StringTools, adapted Std, and haxe.io.BytesBuffer; staged high-leverage Array/Date/EReg/Lambda/Map fixture expansion is tracked separately as haxe.ruby-bjv.20.
Enabled Lambda.unit.hx in the Ruby unitstd lane, documented the new baseline, and split Array/Date/EReg/Map into focused follow-ups haxe.ruby-bjv.25 through .28.

Enabled upstream Array.unit.hx in the portable Ruby unitstd lane, added the IntWrap helper, and fixed Ruby lowering/runtime gaps for Array mutation, dynamic Array/String calls, anonymous object field reads, comparator method references, sparse resize assertions, and key/value iterators.
Enabled upstream Date.unit.hx in the Ruby unitstd lane with a Ruby Time-backed Date implementation, documented local/UTC timezone semantics, and verified npm test plus public precommit.

Enabled upstream EReg.unit.hx in the Ruby unitstd lane with a Ruby Regexp-backed EReg implementation, focused Ruby semantics checks, manifest/docs updates, and local npm test plus public precommit verification.
Enabled upstream Map.unit.hx in Ruby unitstd lane with typed Ruby Hash-backed map helpers, ObjectMap identity semantics, focused map runtime checks, docs, inventory, snapshots, and package artifacts.

Replaced RailsRouteManifest Dynamic/Reflect JSON object construction with typed manifest payload records and explicit schema serialization for Rails-facing keys such as class/options. Verified routes DSL/generator parity, snapshots, npm test, and public:precommit.

Documented the RubyHx std layering contract: Haxe std overrides may consume typed ruby.* facades internally, and users may also use those typed Ruby-shaped facades directly without going through Haxe std wrappers.

Replaced RailsHx compiler manifest Dynamic/Reflect construction with typed manifest/output records and direct string sorting; kept JSON parsing as a narrow documented boundary. Verified format:haxe:check, routes-generator, routes-dsl, rails-runtime, rails-generators, snapshots, npm test, and public:precommit.

Closed the RailsHx production-readiness beta gate: all actionable child gates are complete, docs now describe the production-ready 0.x beta contract and maintenance gates, the optional Phoenix/Elixir migration R&D was detached as blocked post-readiness research, and the latest pushed branch CI/Gitleaks evidence is green.
Closed

The documented RailsHx production-ready beta surface now covers the model, validation, association, and migration production path through completed child and follow-up work; the root readiness gate is closed and docs identify future breadth as beta evolution. Remaining migration breadth is tracked explicitly in haxe_ruby-cnu instead of keeping this P1 bucket open.

The documented RailsHx production-ready beta surface now covers the HHX, ActionView, forms, templates, helper tags, and component path required for the closed readiness gate. Remaining broader component ergonomics, stricter assigns, helper-slot breadth, and full-stack Hotwire contracts are tracked explicitly in haxe_ruby-7ls and haxe_ruby-jgn instead of keeping this P1 bucket open.
Closed
Implemented shared RailsHx Hotwire chat room hook/contract slice with todoapp browser/runtime coverage.
Hardened RailsHx schema adoption fail-closed edge coverage for SQL schemas, unsafe identifiers, and Haxe field collisions.

Implemented current-schema --from-schema migration generator validation for add/remove snapshots, added focused smoke coverage and docs, and split schema-history inference/public DSL semantic expansion into blocked GPT 5.5 Pro review bead haxe_ruby-zsf. Verified npm test and npm run public:precommit.

Preserved decimal precision/scale from schema adoption as checked @:railsColumn metadata, added compiler serialization and macro validation, documented the behavior, and verified focused adoption/model smoke tests.

Preserved nilable scalar RBS metadata as Null<T> in adopted service externs, kept unsupported nilable application types Dynamic, documented the behavior, and verified rails-adopt generator smoke, npm test, and public:precommit.
Added Ruby upstream stdlib parity audit ledger, documentation, npm guard, and validation wiring.
Promoted upstream List.unit.hx into the Ruby unitstd lane, updated parity audit/docs accounting, and verified unitstd, audit, diff, and public precommit gates.
Promoted upstream DateTools.unit.hx into the Ruby unitstd lane, updated parity audit/docs accounting, and verified unitstd, audit, diff, and public precommit gates.

Promoted upstream haxe.io.Path.unit.hx into the Ruby unitstd lane, added the narrow StringTools iterator compatibility helpers needed by upstream Path.normalize, updated parity audit/docs accounting, and verified unitstd, audit, diff, and public precommit gates.

Promoted upstream haxe.crypto.Md5.unit.hx into the Ruby unitstd lane, fixed Ruby lowering for Haxe unsigned right shift and bitwise-not so portable Md5 semantics hold, updated parity audit/docs accounting, and verified unitstd, audit, stdlib-mvp, snapshots, diff, and public precommit gates.
Promoted upstream haxe.crypto.Sha1.unit.hx into the Ruby unitstd lane, updated parity audit/docs accounting, and verified unitstd, audit, diff, and public precommit gates.
Promoted upstream haxe.crypto.Sha256.unit.hx into the Ruby unitstd lane, updated parity audit/docs accounting, and verified unitstd, audit, diff, and public precommit gates.
Promoted upstream haxe.crypto.Sha224.unit.hx into the Ruby unitstd lane, updated parity audit/docs accounting, and verified unitstd, audit, diff, and public precommit gates.

Completed Reflaxe-convention layout refactor: Ruby std overrides now live under std/ruby/_std with haxelib.json reflaxe.stdPaths, source hxml includes _std for the Ruby target, haxelib packaging delegates flattening to vendored Reflaxe Run build, RailsHx browser builds use the separate railshx.client library, generated apps/gem/package checks cover the split, and docs describe the shared std/type boundary and release package shape.

Promoted haxe.crypto.Base64 from upstream-fallback candidate to covered upstream fallback, added the upstream unitstd fixture, updated audit/docs counts, and fixed Ruby static var initializer lowering so Base64 byte alphabets initialize correctly through generated Ruby. Verified with npm test and public:precommit.

Promoted haxe.crypto.Crc32 from upstream-fallback candidate to covered upstream fallback, added the upstream unitstd fixture, updated audit/docs counts, and added the missing Ruby haxe.io.Bytes.fastGet API needed by upstream Crc32 over Bytes. Verified unitstd, parity audit, stdlib inventory, gap report, public precommit, and full npm test.

Promoted haxe.crypto.Hmac from upstream-fallback candidate to covered upstream fallback, added the upstream unitstd fixture, updated audit/docs counts, and fixed the lower-level Ruby seams it exposed: haxe.io.Bytes.toHex and fully qualified enum constructor lowering. Verified focused unitstd/audit/enum/snapshot gates, public precommit, and full npm test.

Promoted haxe.ds.GenericStack from upstream-fallback candidate to covered upstream fallback, added the upstream unitstd fixture, updated manifest/audit/docs counts, and fixed the compiler control-flow gap it exposed by lowering Haxe break to Ruby break and continue to Ruby next. Verified focused unitstd/audit/inventory/gap/format/snapshot/runtime gates, public precommit, and full npm test.

Promoted haxe.Template from upstream-fallback candidate to covered upstream fallback, added the upstream unitstd fixture, updated manifest/audit/docs accounting, and fixed lower-level Ruby compiler gaps it exposed: untyped regex static defaults, enum payload extraction, method-value lowering, and Haxe string concat stringification for String/non-String operands. Verified focused unitstd/audit/inventory/gap/format gates, Todo/routes affected gates, full npm test, and public:precommit.

Promoted haxe.DynamicAccess from upstream-fallback candidate to covered upstream fallback, added the upstream unitstd fixture, updated manifest/audit/docs accounting, and fixed Ruby lowering for true Dynamic field reads/writes so they route through HXRuby reflection while preserving known dynamic Array receiver dispatch such as length/map/filter. Verified unitstd-ruby, stdlib/audit/inventory/gap/format focused gates, runtime minitest, stdlib MVP, m2 snapshots, full npm test, and public:precommit.

Promoted haxe.EnumFlags from upstream-fallback candidate to covered upstream fallback. Added the upstream unitstd fixture, wired it into the Ruby unitstd lane with upstream helper enum constructors in scope, updated manifest/audit/docs accounting, and verified enum flag semantics over enum constructor indexes and integer bit masks including the 31st-bit case. Verified npm run test:unitstd-ruby, npm run test:ruby-stdlib-parity-audit, npm run test:stdlib-inventory, npm run test:gap-report, npm run format:haxe:check, npm run test:runtime-minitest, npm run test:stdlib-mvp, npm run test:m2, npm test, and npm run public:precommit.

Promoted haxe.ds.BalancedTree from upstream-fallback candidate to covered upstream fallback. Added the upstream unitstd fixture, wired it into the Ruby unitstd lane, updated manifest/audit/docs accounting, extended the upstream fixture macro to transform local helper function assertion bodies and 3-arg eq/neq helpers, and fixed Ruby method default-argument emission so typed Haxe defaults such as TreeNode height -1 and EReg matchSub length -1 are preserved instead of nil. Verified npm run test:unitstd-ruby, npm run test:ruby-stdlib-parity-audit, npm run test:stdlib-inventory, npm run test:gap-report, npm run format:haxe:check, npm run test:runtime-minitest, npm run test:stdlib-mvp, npm run test:snapshots, npm run test:m2, npm test, and npm run public:precommit.

Promoted haxe.extern.EitherType from upstream-fallback candidate to covered upstream fallback. Added the upstream unitstd fixture, wired it into the Ruby unitstd lane, and updated manifest/audit/docs accounting. The fixture verifies accepted Int/String EitherType assignments plus compile-time rejection of invalid Bool/Float assignments through the unitstd HelperMacros.typeError shim without adding a Ruby-owned runtime override. Verified npm run test:unitstd-ruby, npm run test:ruby-stdlib-parity-audit, npm run test:stdlib-inventory, npm run test:gap-report, npm run format:haxe:check, npm run test:runtime-minitest, npm run test:stdlib-mvp, npm run test:snapshots, npm test, and npm run public:precommit.

Promoted the unchanged upstream haxe.Log unitstd fixture into the Ruby lane. Added general Ruby lowering for rebindable static and instance Haxe dynamic functions, including receiver-local callback reads, null rebinding, invocation failure, and restoration; preserved upstream PosInfos paths/line numbers; added the upstream exc assertion adapter, class-member runtime/snapshots, manifest/audit/ownership/R&D docs, and formatter provenance exclusion for the line-sensitive fixture. Verified focused parity/compiler/runtime/snapshot gates, npm test, and npm run public:precommit.

Promoted an adapted upstream Reflect.unit.hx fixture into the Ruby unitstd lane; fixed Haxe-owned Reflect member-name mapping and String object classification, preserved optional enum payload defaults in generated Ruby, added focused runtime/enum coverage, refreshed generated runtime artifacts and parity docs, and passed focused gates, npm test, and public:precommit.

Promoted an adapted upstream Type.unit.hx fixture into the Ruby unitstd lane; corrected getClass classification for Haxe primitive/type values and anonymous objects, emitted target-referenced haxe.macro enums, added compact source-name field metadata with inherited instance-field semantics, added focused runtime/generated-shape coverage, refreshed generated artifacts and parity docs, and passed focused gates, npm test, and public:precommit.
Closed
Closed

Promoted the unchanged upstream haxe.rtti.Rtti unitstd fixture, fixed typed static initializer and root Xml lowering gaps, made Ruby Hash static-map construction load-order safe, added focused generated-shape coverage, and updated parity/ownership/R&D/README accounting. npm test and npm run public:precommit pass.

Promoted adapted upstream haxe.zip.Compress and Uncompress unitstd fixtures with unchanged assertions; added automatic #if ruby target definition, typed Array#pack and Zlib extern contracts, Ruby-owned one-shot Haxe ZIP overrides, arbitrary binary and invalid-input coverage, generated-shape checks, and refreshed manifest/audit/inventory/R&D/ownership/README/gap-report docs. npm test and public:precommit pass.
Closed

Promoted dedicated upstream StringMap, IntMap, ObjectMap, and EnumValueMap fixtures directly plus Vector with only dynamic-neutral-value guard adaptations. Added compiler lowering for portable Array length assignment and Vector identity equality, inlined identity Hash construction, added generated-shape coverage, and updated manifest/audit/inventory/R&D/ownership/root and unitstd README docs. npm test and public:precommit pass.

Added the precisely typed ruby.Pathname extern with automatic pathname require and Haxe-idiomatic direct receiver mappings; added a dedicated runtime/generated-shape gate covering construction, composition, decomposition, normalization, relative paths, predicates, children, and reads; updated inventory/gap report, facade guide, R&D/ownership docs, root README, npm test chain, and Haxelib package contract. npm test and public:precommit pass.
Typed ruby.Dir facade, executable and snapshot contracts, documentation, inventory, audit records, and package coverage are complete and all local gates pass.
Typed ruby.FileUtils facade, security boundary, isolated executable/snapshot contracts, documentation, inventory, audit, and package coverage are complete and all local gates pass.

Implemented typed Tempfile lifecycle and File IO facades, safe inline/stored @:rubyBlockArg call-site lowering, canonical compiler-metadata documentation and guard, exhaustive docs/inventory/snapshot/package coverage, and verified the complete local test, example, todoapp, Playwright, Rails, packaging, format, and security gates.
Structured callable AST nodes, shared ABI validation, precise ActiveRecord write carriers, diagnostics, documentation, generated artifacts, snapshots, and full QA are complete.

Implemented symmetric Haxe-owned Ruby block definitions with yield/capture analysis, safe inline return lowering, constructor/module/concern/patch/forwarding support, Ruby-origin runtime coverage, exact snapshots, and complete documentation; all local gates pass.

Implemented symmetric typed Ruby keyword calls/definitions, native method naming, Haxe Rest/splat lowering, nominal model-scoped Rails strong params, fail-closed diagnostics, executable snapshots/runtime/browser coverage, and current README/reference docs. Full npm test matrix, Rails runtime, todoapp Chromium E2E, production smoke, packaging, formatting, and Gitleaks pass.

Implemented one effective Ruby callable ABI across method values, inheritance, interfaces, overrides, recursion, modules, concerns, native names, and same-method super forwarding. Added structured positional-to-keyword/block adapters with exactly-once receiver evaluation, fail-closed ABI and cross-method-super diagnostics, executable runtime/Ruby-origin coverage, deterministic snapshots, example coverage, and complete callable ABI/metadata/README documentation. Verified npm test, 15/15 Todo Chromium E2E, Todo production smoke (26 runs/217 assertions), mandatory Rails runtime, public precommit/Gitleaks, formatting, and diff hygiene.

Implemented behavior-preserving native Ruby Array map/select lowering with strict-lambda preservation for stored and non-tail-return callbacks; removed array_map/array_filter helpers from runtime, policy, snapshots, route-parity dogfood, and Todo artifacts. Added the documented examples/ruby_callable_abi contract with typed externs, direct/captured/forwarded/optional/keyword-plus-block methods, exact snapshots, Haxe-origin runtime, and committed handwritten Ruby-origin coverage without hxruby/core.rb or HXRuby semantic calls. Tightened ruby.Kernel puts/print from Dynamic to method generics and updated README, ABI design, std ownership/R&D/facade, parity, compatibility, and example docs. Verified npm test, 30 examples, deterministic snapshots, upstream unitstd, runtime minitest/policy, Todo production (26 runs/217 assertions), Playwright 15/15, mandatory Rails runtime, packages, formatting, Gitleaks, and diff hygiene.

Replaced the generic typed-expression nil/TODO fallback with an exhaustive TypedExprDef decision: value-capable forms retain explicit lowerings, statement-only TVar/TFor/TWhile/TReturn forms fail if they reach value lowering, and unconsumed TIdent intrinsics fail with kind/name/source-position diagnostics. Removed the inline declaration TODO fallback in favor of an internal compiler error. Added a focused positive statement runtime fixture and a confined negative __unprotect__/TIdent boundary fixture, integrated it into npm test, and documented the compiler correctness/erasure contract in README, docs index, compatibility matrix, and docs/compiler-correctness.md. Verified full npm test, 30 examples, deterministic snapshots, Todo Playwright 15/15, production 26 runs/217 assertions, mandatory Rails runtime, packages, formatting, Gitleaks, no tracked TODO fallback markers, and diff hygiene.

Completed the symmetric Ruby callable ABI across structured call/signature AST, native blocks, keyword/rest arguments, native names, constructors, forwarding, method values, inheritance/super, and native Array map/select lowering. Added Haxe-origin and handwritten Ruby-origin executable coverage, source-positioned fail-closed diagnostics for unsupported typed expressions, canonical examples/snapshots, and comprehensive compiler/interop documentation. No new Dynamic/cast/raw-Ruby app API leaks; full local examples, Todo production, Playwright, Rails runtime, package, public-precommit, and Ruby 3.2/3.3/4.0 remote CI plus Gitleaks are green.

Selected normal stable 0.x releases from main and replaced default commit analysis with a documented policy wrapper over the official Conventional Commit analyzer. The policy derives lineage only from exact canonical v<SemVer> tags, uses directly pinned semver 7.8.4, maps unapproved major-zero breaking changes to minor releases, requires contiguous independent approvals for 1.0 and every later stable major, and fails closed on missing/mismatched tags, invalid/unsupported versions, unknown majors, and unapproved stable breaks. Added direct fix/feat/breaking/prerelease/no-release/negative coverage plus a real semantic-release dry run proving tag ownership despite contradictory package metadata; wired the gate into full and fast CI; updated README, docs index, canonical release policy, and evidence-gated AGENTS guidance. Verified npm test (30 examples, snapshots, packages), Playwright 15/15, Todo production 26 runs/217 assertions plus eager load/archive, mandatory Rails runtime, formatter, Gitleaks, focused policy/contracts, syntax, and diff hygiene.

Replaced release-time tracked version rewrites and release commits with a validated version/tag/source-SHA identity staged only into temporary Haxelib and gem trees. Tracked npm/Haxelib/HXML/Ruby version surfaces now use the documented 0.0.0 development sentinel; sync-versions, changelog/git release plugins, README rewriting, and wildcard uploads are removed. Both fixed local artifacts embed consistent staged metadata, HXRuby::VERSION, and release-provenance.json, while package tests assert checkout diff immutability and consumer install/runtime behavior. GitHub release configuration uses exact fixed paths, versioned hosted names, a version heading, and generated notes with compare/commit links; CHANGELOG is reviewed frozen history. Full npm test, all 30 examples, staged Haxelib/gem consumers, Playwright 15/15, Todo production 26 runs/217 assertions plus eager load/archive, mandatory Rails runtime, formatter, Gitleaks, syntax, and diff hygiene pass.
Closed

Moved normal publication into the final privileged job of the same canonical-main push workflow, gated by security, formatter, Ruby 3.2/3.3/4.0 full suites, Rails runtime/browser/production, and release/artifact contracts. The job checks out github.sha with full history, rebuilds without imported artifacts/caches, uses contents-write only and the fixed release concurrency group, disables release comments/labels, and pins full-SHA Actions plus exact Node 22.14.0/npm 10.9.2/Ruby 3.3.11/RubyGems 3.5.22/Haxe 4.3.7/npm tooling. Removed manual normal release and separate security workflows, made npm ci/audit clean, added 10-case trigger/gate tests and comprehensive docs, and switched Playwright to its locked local binary. Exact-toolchain full npm test, 30 examples, Playwright 15/15, Todo production 26 runs/217 assertions, mandatory Rails runtime, package consumers, release preparation, formatter, Gitleaks, and zero-vulnerability audit pass.

Implemented tested-commit publication as the final canonical-main CI job with all security/compiler/Rails/browser/production/release needs, exact github.sha checkout, minimal contents-write permission, no artifact/cache import, fixed concurrency, full-SHA Actions, exact release toolchains, npm ci, zero-vulnerability audit, disabled release comments/labels, and a 10-case event/gate matrix. Removed manual normal release and separate security workflows, documented the full contract, and used locked Playwright directly. After the first push correctly blocked publication because the dedicated artifact-contract lane lacked Haxe/Neko, installed and verified Haxe in that lane and explicitly disabled setup-node v6's implicit npm cache in the privileged job. Exact-toolchain full npm test, 30 examples, Playwright 15/15, Todo production 26 runs/217 assertions, mandatory Rails runtime, packages, release preparation, formatter, Gitleaks, clean audit, and the corrected focused release-contract sequence pass.

Implemented same-run tested-commit publication with all required security/compiler/Rails/browser/production/release gates, exact SHA checkout, minimal permission, fixed concurrency, full-SHA Actions, exact locked toolchains, no imported executable artifacts/caches, clean audit, event/gate tests, and comprehensive docs. Two hosted dry failures correctly blocked publication: first the release-contract lane lacked Haxe/Neko; then its clean runner exposed that Haxe's install hook invokes lix by name before node_modules/.bin had entered PATH. The final workflow installs Haxe in the contract lane, exports the locked local binary path before all direct lix downloads in both contract and privileged jobs, and asserts that ordering so developer PATH state cannot mask it. Final npm test (30 examples, snapshots, Haxelib 637 files, gem), exact Node 22.14.0/npm 10.9.2 release policy/contracts/reproducibility sequence, clean npm audit, isolated clean-PATH Haxe setup, formatter, Gitleaks, YAML, and diff hygiene all pass.

Completed exact tested-SHA publication with all same-run gates, minimal privileges, locked toolchains, deterministic artifacts, documented contracts, and hosted clean-run fixes. Live CI exposed three correctly blocked gaps: missing Haxe in release contracts, lix unavailable to Haxe child installs until local PATH was exported first, and semantic-release stable branches ignoring the immutable v0.1.0-beta.2 prerelease baseline. Added a narrowly scoped Git-derived promotion bridge that accepts only the configured newest merged major-zero prerelease, creates local-only v0.0.0 at the same commit, forces the first qualifying stable result to v0.1.0, anchors generated compare notes to the real beta tag, deletes the alias before any push, and becomes a no-op after stable lineage exists. A real temporary-remote test proves the exact remote tags are only v0.1.0-beta.2 and v0.1.0. Final Node 22.14.0/npm 10.9.2 npm test, 30 examples, snapshots, Haxelib 637 files, gem, Playwright 15/15, Todo production 26 runs/217 assertions, mandatory Rails runtime, exact transition/contracts/reproducibility, zero-vulnerability audit, formatter, Gitleaks, YAML, syntax, alias absence, and diff hygiene pass.

Implemented one version/SHA identity across local/origin tags, ZIP, gem, exact hosted assets, draft verification/publication, native immutability, and existing-tag-only repair; added executable state/workflow contracts and comprehensive docs; enabled verified tag ruleset 18851281 and immutable releases; full local compiler/examples/Playwright/production/Rails runtime/release/security QA is green.

Implemented and documented complete hosted release identity, draft verification/publication, native immutability, tag protection, and existing-tag-only repair. Live run 29218610789 proved every test/security/compiler/Rails/browser/production prerequisite green but exposed an admission-only GitHub Actions edge: the release job was skipped with zero steps under the implicit status filter. Replaced that implicit state with !cancelled() plus exact success checks for every declared need, preserving fail-closed behavior for failed/skipped/cancelled/missing gates. Focused release/workflow/artifact/audit/public-precommit gates pass; the next full push run will prove publication live.

Completed hosted identity and repair hardening with live GitHub proof iterations. Run 29218610789 proved all prerequisites green and exposed implicit release-job admission skipping; explicit !cancelled plus exact successful-needs checks fixed admission. Run 29220128849 then created the exact v0.1.1 tag/draft/four assets and exposed that GitHub's release-by-tag endpoint omits drafts. Added bounded authenticated draft-list discovery with regression coverage. Repair now builds artifacts from the clean immutable tag, then overlays only scripts/release from github.workflow_sha so reviewed repair fixes can service old tags without checking out main or changing artifact inputs. Focused workflow/hosting/artifact/audit/public-precommit gates pass; v0.1.1 draft is intact for the corrected manual repair lane.

Live repair run 29221763110 proved workflow-tool overlay and exact tag rebuild succeeded, then exposed GitHub's persistent draft tag_name as internal untagged-<hex>. Added a narrow temporary-draft contract: authenticated lookup accepts that shape only for a draft whose name is exact vV; assets are fully verified before PATCH binding tag_name/target SHA/name; metadata and bytes are revalidated before immutable publication; completed releases never accept internal tags. State coverage now includes temporary draft binding and all focused workflow/hosting/artifact/audit gates pass.

Completed the release documentation/evidence migration and live proof. README, AGENTS, package, SemVer, notes, distribution, consumer digest, immutable-hosting, and operator repair guidance now describe the tested-commit protocol and GitHub-only distribution. Durable evidence records v0.1.0 source/tag/run/job/artifact bytes/digests/channel/legacy immutability, immutable v0.1.1 repair and v0.1.2 normal publication, tag protection, and hosted no-op run 29225406658/job 86742889294 for docs commit e485d09 with unchanged tags/releases and zero drafts. Full npm/compiler/examples/snapshots/Haxelib/gem, Playwright 15/15, production 26 runs/217 assertions, mandatory Rails runtime, release failure-injection/reproducibility, npm audit, formatter, Gitleaks, and GitHub CI are green.

Completed all six tested-commit SemVer release protocol slices: conventional major-zero policy, staging-only identity, reproducible ZIP/gem artifacts, exact same-run tested-SHA publication, immutable hosted identity and existing-tag-only repair, plus fully migrated docs and live/no-release proof. Normal publication and repair are proven live, version tags are protected, native immutable releases are enabled, and the complete local/hosted QA contract is green.

Vendored the narrow recursive TLazy function-field fix from Reflaxe PR #52 commit 024937acffd242f129265d969a840d3779f02bcd in ClassFieldHelper for both function extraction and overload cache identity. Added a real Context.getType/filterTypes regression that failed on the predecessor, source/release/package contracts, and complete README/package/vendor provenance plus upstream replacement policy. No Dynamic, cast, or raw target escape was added. Verified npm test (30 examples, snapshots, 639-file haxelib, gem), Todo Playwright 15/15, production 26 runs/217 assertions, mandatory Rails runtime, public precommit/Gitleaks, and GitHub CI run 29233425393 (all 12 jobs success) for commit 3b5092ef912de31e12abd6d6699d07b56e2ac261.

Implemented deterministic, non-executing YARD service adoption with safe-path and explicit-service validation, nested constants, precise supported scalar/nilable/Array/Boolean types, review-only omission of unsupported signatures, Rails/Rake forwarding, manifest/compiler/package contracts, and comprehensive README/workflow/compatibility/gem-layer documentation. Generated YARD contracts contain no Dynamic, cast, raw, or untyped escape. Local npm, examples, Playwright (15/15), production (26 runs/217 assertions), Rails runtime, packaging, release-contract, formatter, and secret gates passed. GitHub CI run 29244885544 attempt 3 passed all test, browser, audit, runtime, dogfood, and exact-SHA release jobs.

Implemented automatic deterministic YARD discovery for Bundler-resolved gem lib sources without executing gem code or requiring manual --yard paths. YARD-backed constants are strict precise-or-omitted across same-file and cross-file reopenings; conflicting documented definitions become load-order review diagnostics; source-only constants retain the existing explicit review skeleton. Canonical path checks reject lib/source symlink escapes. Added per-constant generated provenance docs, committed extern/doc snapshots, source-execution trap, manifest/negative/no-Dynamic-cast-raw-untyped assertions, generated-Haxe compilation, release guards, and complete README/compatibility/gem-layer/workflow/gradual-adoption/security/generated-app documentation. Local npm test, 30 examples, packages, public precommit/Gitleaks, Todo Playwright 15/15, production 26 runs/217 assertions, and mandatory Rails runtime passed.
